name: BoJ Policy Rate (Uncollateralized Overnight Call Rate)
notes: T2 backup for FRED IRSTCB01JPM156N (frozen 2008-12) and T1 (DB.nomics IMF IFS M.JP.FPOLM_PA — wired Stage B). BoJ Time-Series Data Search Daily call rate average. URL pattern verified against manuals/BOJ_api_manual_en.pdf. Wired §3.1 Stage D.3 2026-04-30.

name: BoJ Tankan: Large Enterprises / Manufacturing / Business Conditions DI (Actual result)
units: Diffusion Index (% positive minus % negative responses)
notes: New series — primary path for a Japan business-survey signal. Replaces the proprietary au Jibun Bank Mfg PMI (JP_PMI1) which has been Insufficient Data since Phase D. The Tankan Large Mfg Business Conditions DI is the canonical free Japan business-confidence indicator; quarterly cadence (Mar/Jun/Sep/Dec). Phase E _calc_JP_PMI1 substitution deferred to §3.1.8 Stage E (would z-score and resample to Friday spine). Wired §3.1 Stage D.3 2026-04-30.

name: Japan Producer Price Index (All Commodities)
notes: BoJ Time-Series Data Search PR01'PRCG20_2200000000 — Producer Price Index (Corporate Goods Price Index) All commodities, 2020 base. Verified live 2026-06-10 (monthly back to 1960-01; last 2026-05). Leads CPI by 2-3m; canonical JP producer-inflation gauge.

name: Japan Services Producer Price Index (All Items)
notes: BoJ Time-Series Data Search PR02'PRCS20_5200000000 — Services Producer Price Index All items basic-grouping index, 2020 base. Verified live 2026-06-10 (monthly back to 1985-01; last 2026-04). Tracks B2B service-sector inflation; complements JPN_PPI for goods-vs-services inflation read.
